Active Planned Care / GoalsStart DateReason
Lifestyle education regarding hypertension01-Nov-2019Essential hypertension (disorder)
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
  • Reduce daily sodium intake to less than 2.3 grams per day.
  • Achieve at least 5% reduction in body weight to support blood pressure control.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity aerobic physical activity per week.
Diabetes self management plan15-Jul-2011Prediabetes
  • Patient will demonstrate understanding of prediabetes and diabetes self-management strategies including diet, exercise, and blood glucose monitoring.
  • Reduce HbA1c to below 5.7% to prevent progression from prediabetes to diabetes.
  • Patient will achieve a 5% reduction in body weight to improve insulin sensitivity and reduce risk of diabetes progression.
  • Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular risk associated with prediabetes.
  • Engage in at least 150 minutes of moderate-intensity physical activity per week to improve glycemic control.
